last_summary: Real-world validation: installed on a second, unrelated project (Agente de Produção Artística) via npx from the public registry. First session logged real facts/risks/todos about that codebase; a completely fresh third session recalled all of it via the SessionStart hook + AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md, with no re-exploration of the code. Confirms cross-session, low-token handoff works end-to-end in practice, not just in the smoke test.
